market.macro_notes_md: JULY 14 2026 MIDDAY UPDATE: CPI COOL PRINT CHANGES THE PICTURE. June CPI: Headline 3.5% YoY vs 3.8% expected (monthly -0.4% sa vs -0.2% expected). Core 2.6% vs 2.8% expected. This is the most significant dovish macro development YTD — September rate hike probability dropping sharply; September rate cut back on the table. Impact: (1) Growth names (AMD, META, PLTR) see discount rate relief — Nasdaq +0.81%. (2) Financial stocks benefit from lower rates and record Q2 earnings (GS +7.7%). (3) IBM -22% on Q2 earnings warning — isolated event, not macro-driven. Enterprise consulting weakness from customers prioritizing hardware over software. (4) Iran Hormuz blockade continues (Brent $85+) but CPI data showed gasoline contribution declining — oil price spike not accelerating. Warsh Congressional testimony ongoing — tone is key for afternoon session. Kevin Warsh inaugural testimony. UPCOMING: BlackRock July 15 (pre-market). Netflix July 16 (AH). AMD Advancing AI 2026 conference July 22-23.
